root_cause_receipt.diagnosis: The source test target attempts a network-capable rustup component installation before any Cargo test. The frozen outcome environment correctly denies network access; the source Makefile redirects that prerequisite's stderr to /dev/null and make exits before emitting a test identity. Identical baseline and gold termination therefore diagnoses harness/environment incompatibility, not task correctness or mechanism performance.
